name: login-system-with-blog-project
description: One-command runnable Login System with Blog Project

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"

author: Antigravity
